query_title: At Midnight I'll Take Your Soul

recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.

recommendations.title: Bulbbul
recommendations.overview: A child bride grows up to be an enigmatic woman presiding over her household, harboring a painful past as supernatural murders of men plague her village.

recommendations.title: Disorder
recommendations.overview: An ex-soldier with PTSD is hired to protect the wife and child of a wealthy Lebanese businessman while he's out of town.

recommendations.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
recommendations.overview: The life story of Brazilian football legend, Pele.

recommendations.title: Hatching
recommendations.overview: 12 year old Tinja is desperate to please her mother, a woman obsessed with presenting the image of a perfect family. One night, Tinja finds a strange egg. What hatches is beyond belief.

recommendations.title: Tales from the Darkside: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A young boy tells three stories of horror to distract a witch who plans to eat him.

recommendations.title: Uzumaki
recommendations.overview: The inhabitants of a small Japanese town become increasingly obsessed with and tormented by spirals.

recommendations.title: Messiah of Evil
recommendations.overview: A young woman searching for her missing artist father finds herself in the strange seaside town of Point Dune, which seems to be under the influence of a mysterious undead cult.

recommendations.title: Backcountry
recommendations.overview: A couple on a deep-wilderness hike become hopelessly lost within an aggressive black bear's territory.

recommendations.title: Lifechanger
recommendations.overview: A murderous shapeshifter sets out on a blood-soaked mission to make things right with the woman he loves.
